notes: This registry declares tasks the repo dispatcher is allowed to run.
The dispatcher rejects undeclared task names.
Commands are intentionally simple and repo-local.
Schema version 1.13 through 1.22 add the next ten provisional RTG test layers.

tasks.name: fixture_smoke_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG fixture shape and allowed values.

tasks.name: cell_geometry_smoke_tests
tasks.description: Validate first provisional RTG cell-geometry invariants.

tasks.name: function_class_behavior_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG function-class behavior profiles.

tasks.name: coupling_translation_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG translated coupling effects between cells.

tasks.name: shell_role_expectation_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG s/p/d/f shell-role behavior expectations.

tasks.name: dark_cell_color_emergence_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG dark-cell color emergence behavior.

tasks.name: zeno_transition_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG Zeno-prone transition behavior.

tasks.name: stabilization_emission_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG stabilization-to-emission threshold behavior.

tasks.name: observer_window_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG observer-window visibility, classification, and emission behavior.

tasks.name: authority_bound_emission_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG authority-bound emission behavior.

tasks.name: uncertainty_class_separation_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG separation of false transitions from unknown unknowns.

tasks.name: observer_identity_coupling_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG observer identity compatibility with transition identity classes.

tasks.name: transition_replay_validation_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG replay and receipt consistency for transition claims.

tasks.name: receipt_chain_continuity_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG receipt-chain continuity behavior.

tasks.name: state_lineage_integrity_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG state-lineage integrity behavior.

tasks.name: coupling_replay_consistency_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG coupling-replay consistency behavior.

tasks.name: emission_export_boundary_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG emission-export boundary behavior.

tasks.name: anomaly_retention_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG anomaly retention behavior.

tasks.name: detector_coverage_gap_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG detector coverage gap behavior.

tasks.name: confidence_regrade_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG confidence regrade behavior.

tasks.name: quarantine_release_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG quarantine release behavior.

tasks.name: supersession_ordering_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG supersession ordering behavior.

tasks.name: governance_output_consistency_tests
tasks.description: Validate provisional RTG governance-output consistency behavior.

tasks.name: dispatcher_self_check
tasks.description: Validate dispatcher registry shape and unknown-task rejection.
